data.title: Data
data.clearConfirm: This will delete all your activity data from this device. You can re-import at any time.
data.stale: Your data is {{days}} days old — recent activities are missing.
data.staleCta: Request a fresh archive on Strava →

about.title: About
about.legal: This app processes data you exported from Strava's official account-export under GDPR Article 20. It is not affiliated with Strava.
about.privacy: No data ever leaves your device. We have no server, no database, and no analytics.
